message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8,400. To verify identity, please confirm either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. And like I said, I can’t pay this month—I’m out of work right now.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
I don’t think so. I’m unemployed right now and can’t commit to any payment timeline.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no income expected within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosures given in chat: AI identity disclosed and conversation logging disclosed. Verification completed by full name matching borrower profile. Debt already established with borrower as Slice account ****1184, amount due 8400. Borrower stated they cannot pay this month, are out of work, unemployed, do not expect income within 21 days, and cannot commit to any payment timeline. Hardship signal present: ongoing unemployment/no income; hardship review needed per Slice policy. Assessment asked the single required hardship timing question and it was answered. Next stage should not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next priority: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, with hardship review as the only live path if policy remains unchanged."}

I understand, but I still can’t pay right now and I’m not agreeing to any timeline.

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the only live path on this account right now. I’ve noted that you cannot pay now and are not agreeing to any payment timeline. If you want contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available, say that and I’ll record it.
Yes, only contact me if there’s an approved hardship option. I still can’t pay right now.
Understood. I’ve recorded that you cannot pay right now and that you want contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available. No further payment discussion is needed at this stage.

Understood. Your request to be contacted only if an approved hardship option becomes available has been noted. There is no approved hardship option available at this time. We will only reach out if a concrete approved hardship outcome becomes available.
